prompt: research the tradeoffs between SQLite and PostgreSQL for a side project that might grow

assertions.description: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections
Mentions concurrency or write contention as a tradeoff
Provides a concrete recommendation or decision guidance
assertions.check: output contains 'recommend' or 'suggest' or 'start with' or 'choose' or 'pick'

assertions.description: Has a key takeaways or summary section
assertions.check: output contains 'takeaway' or 'summary' or 'conclusion' or 'Key' or 'Decision'

assertions.description: Total execution time is under 60 seconds
Output contains at least 1 sourced URL (https://)
Output has a Sources or References section with markdown links
Answer has at least 100 words of substantive content
